name: Brisket of Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the brisket in a slow cooker or oven-safe dish.
2. Mix the onion soup mix with 2 cups of water and pour over the meat.
3. Pour the can of stewed tomatoes over the brisket.
4. Add the ginger snap cookies to the liquid, breaking them up if necessary.
5. Cover the pan securely with aluminum foil (or place the lid on the slow cooker).
6. Bake at 325°F for three hours without peeking.
7. Remove the meat and slice it thinly against the grain.
8. Return the slices to the pan with the gravy.
9. Reseal and bake at 225°F for about one hour, ensuring all slices are covered by liquid to prevent drying out.
10. Serve tender, delicious brisket with gravy over rice or wide noodles.
